title: Earthy American Christmas Pudding
description: This earthy, flaky dessert features Christmas pudding, spherified for a unique midnight craving treat. It's anti-inflammatory-friendly and perfect for a cold winter night.
instructions: In a small bowl, sprinkle gelatin over 1/4 cup (60ml) of cold water and let it sit for 5 minutes to soften.
In a large saucepan, combine honey, cinnamon powder, clove powder, and salt. Heat over medium heat, stirring until honey dissolves.
Add the softened gelatin to the saucepan and stir until dissolved.
Stir in the heavy cream and let the mixture simmer for 5 minutes, or until slightly thickened.
Remove the saucepan from the heat and let the mixture cool to room temperature.
Once cooled, stir in the Christmas pudding and spherification agent.
Using a syringe or pipette, drop small amounts of the mixture into a bath of water mixed with a pinch of salt.
Watch as the mixture forms into small, round spherules. When ready to serve, simply pop the spherules into your mouth and enjoy!
notes: Note: This recipe is designed to be made with an anti-inflammatory diet in mind. Please adjust ingredients according to your dietary needs.
